name: United Wire Factories Company
summary: United Wire Factories Company manufactures and sells steel wire products for the civil, agricultural, and industrial sectors in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. The company provides steel rebars, wire meshes, ladder meshes, nails, and fences, as well as tying, concertina, and barbed wires for use in the construction and building materials sector. It also offers bailing and black annealed wires, cloth hangers, welded wire mesh sheets and rolls, and staple clips for use in civil sector; and black drawn, galvanized, PVC coated, and deformed wires for use in industrial products. In addition, the company also offers lattice wires, metal braiding wires, reinforcing steel bars, reinforcing steels, metal strips, plastic tapes, oxygen wires, metal bondings, and woods, as well as carpentry, iron, angles, rectangles, rectification, cutting, reinforcing, smelting, and rolling of iron, and import and export. United Wire Factories Company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Riyadh, the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
